summary: Full-stack testing of GLO Venture rice delivery app. 15/15 backend pytest cases passed against public URL. End-to-end Playwright frontend test passed for landing page, order placement (with running total verification), order success page, admin login (bad + good creds), dashboard with stats/orders/filters, status update via dropdown (persisted), and logout. All key data-testid attributes present and working.

minor.issue: Empty items list returns 400 as expected; however spec requested 400 for empty items — current code raises after pydantic OK, returns 400. Works correctly.

allow_origins is '*' from .env CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=False — fine for token-based auth, but inconsistent with playbook expectation of explicit origins + credentialed cookies. Token auth via Authorization header works, so it's a minor hardening suggestion only.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: get_current_admin still falls back to cookie even though FE only uses Bearer — harmless but unused branch. Consider removing or documenting.
server.py: CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=False is OK for current Bearer-only flow; if cookie auth is enabled later, must set explicit origins.
server.py: PRODUCTS list is hardcoded (intentional per problem statement). Fine for MVP.
Order.jsx: submitWhatsapp swallows POST errors silently — by design (non-blocking) but no user feedback if backend save fails. Acceptable for WhatsApp fallback flow.
AdminDashboard.jsx: status update is optimistic via setOrders without re-fetching stats; stats counters may drift until next refresh. Minor UX nit.
No data-testid on order-success page for confirm-on-WhatsApp link is present (success-whatsapp) — OK.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env — acceptable for preview, must rotate before prod.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test order via POST /api/orders during pytest (TEST_Alice) and 1 via Playwright (TEST_Playwright User). Status of one was changed to confirmed/out_for_delivery. Visible in admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 15 tests covering products, orders CRUD, admin login, JWT auth on protected endpoints, status updates, validation errors. Fixture admin_token re-uses session-scoped login. Public URL is read from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Admin creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Token stored in localStorage 'glo_admin_token' on FE.
rca of the issue: No issues found. App is functioning as designed per problem statement.
